examples.prompt: Turn my blog article into a short video with automatic captions

use_cases.title: Blog-to-Video Content

pros: Unique blog-to-video and webinar-to-clip features — no other tool automates content repurposing this well

Stock footage library of 6M+ clips built in, no need for separate subscriptions
cons: Video output is limited to 1080p maximum — no 4K export option available
Limited editing capabilities compared to dedicated video editors like VEED.io
